ios.title: Block Out! - Color Sort Puzzle
ios.description:
Get ready for Block Out!, a block puzzle game where every level feels alive. Slide colorful blocks, match them with their targets while experiencing the unique twist of moving elevators and block generators. Each puzzle feels fresh with ever-changing layouts. Plan your moves, think quickly, and enjoy the satisfaction of perfect clears as you progress through a colorful and evolving puzzle adventure. Block Out! offers a puzzle experience that keeps you coming back for more. Accept the challenge and start your journey! 

Quick Play Guide
- Start Simple: Slide the blocks to the matching doors and create satisfying clears.
- Plan Ahead: Position blocks carefully, manage space, and keep up with dynamic challenges. 
- Think Fast: Move faster to complete levels and unlock new challenges.

Cool Features
- Offline Play: Enjoy anywhere, anytime—no wi-fi required.
- Strategic Gameplay: Start simple, think twice. Plan your moves and experience the satisfaction of clearing each puzzle.
- Dynamic Obstacles:  Block generators, moving elevators, and other elements bring variety and spice to every level.
- Colorful Visuals: Bright and gorgeous design makes every puzzle a joy to solve.

Block Out! is designed for puzzle lovers who enjoy both strategy and action. Download Block Out! now and explore the dynamic world of colorful puzzles.

positive.text: Fun game with no adds. Love it

I would enjoy if there was an ad option to get some extra coins. Also sometimes the lives are annoying! If you lose you can run out of lives and have to wait 3-20 minutes!!!! This is a very nice app. Helps get your mind off of your daily stress. But for older people who are in the beginning stages of dementia it would be wonderful if you didn’t have some of the stages timed. Or the option of it not being timed. If you would consider putting out something like that, I think you’d have even more people downloading app.
This is a game for the brains, Depression, anxiety,and sadness

This game is very enjoyable and fun to play. It keeps players entertained with exciting challenges, interesting gameplay, and plenty of opportunities to improve skills. The graphics and overall design make the experience even better. Whether playing alone or with friends, the game provides hours of entertainment and is easy to recommend to others.

I deleted this app because I didn’t want to spend any more money out of pocket to just pass a level. It’s a waste of money because you run into the exact same problem again in another few levels.

同様のゲームはいっぱいありますが、良心的だしイラストも可愛いのでダウンロードしてよかったです！

positive.userName: まこちゃん、まじてんし！
positive.text: 広告がなくサクサク進んでいく！

パズル自体は楽しいです。
広告のストレスもなくてよいです。
難易度も程よくて楽しめます。
タイマーがあるのでのんびり考える余裕はなく、それがかえってサクサク進められる一因になっているかもしれません。
脳トレにも向いているのではないでしょうか。
ただ、じっくり考えて解きたい方にとってはタイマーがあると急かされる感じがするかもしれません。たまに気分転換程度に遊ぶのが自分にはあっていると感じました。
毎回コインしか当たりません。ずっとピンクを選び続けてたのでピンクはコインしか出ないのかと思い別の色を選ぶようになったら私が選ぶ箱全てがコインになります。コインは使えるので別にいいんですが、アイテムも出るよーみたいな顔しといてコインしか出されないと腹たちます
いいですねー楽しいしすご〜く面白いです。
広告が流れて来ないのが良いですね。パズルもサクサク進むのでハマっています。

positive.userName: オーバークック楽しい
positive.text: この手のパズルゲームが好きな人ならサクサク簡単な方だと思う。広告もずっと無いし、コインも2万超えた。詰んだりしないし、課金しなくても楽しめる。
他のゲームではワンステージごとにCMを見なければ進めないのが多いが、これは続けて出来るのが軽快です良い。

アイテムのプレゼントもたくさんあって、本当に良いです。とても楽しいのでお礼も兼ねて少し課金しています。

Every level has a timer and 9/10 times the timer is barely long enough to complete the level so you’re stressing out to try solve the level so you don’t lose your whopping 5 lives immediately. Hard to enjoy the game and participate in the events because it’s extremely hard to even pass the normal levels most of the time.

It WAS fun… not by level 44. Spend coins to finish it unless your fingers are blazing fast. I just want a game that’s challenging sure, but not that forces you to watch ads to compete. Hard Pass. Deleting.

Needs a login session, so therefore I can retrieve my progress from another device. It’s a great game. I love it but having to start over is completely insane.

This game pushes so hard on making you buy power ups in order to beat a level. I just wanted a simple game to play when winding down. This isn’t it. It’s frustrating and you can’t pass the levels after like 49 or whatever I was on. Don’t care. Uninstalled.

I enjoyed this TIMED game for awhile, but then it got ridiculously hard, (even the so-called easier ones) I found myself shelving out money to get past that round just to end the game because it was getting monotonous and boring. My suggestion is don’t play this game, and keep your money.
This game is NOT ad free

I downloaded this after seeing the ad on a different game about this one having no ads, i looked at the reviews and they said no ads. i download it, everytime i finish a level, mid level, or i fail a level, i got unprompted ads. change the ads that tell us about no ads bc this is literally bs.

Was enjoying the games, but then the ads started at about level 37.  Every time you win a level, or lose, you have to watch ads. I hate that. I will stick with games like Lily’s garden and dragon scapes- there are no ads unless you opt to watch one to receive an extra life, or rewards

This game has taken all of happiness from my day. There is not physically enough time to slide all the block into the right places on some levels. Whoever made this game needs to strongly consider a career change because they have managed to make something so simple and fun one of the most aggravating and frustrating things.

It’s all well & good that there are no ads. But they set timers for the puzzles, which are purposely too short to solve some of them, meaning you need to purchase aids to complete puzzles in time and progress. That’s how they make the money, by setting the difficulty too high.
You make it where it’s not fun when you have to buy coins to get over a hard or extremely hard level.
I don’t like the fact that it has a timer on it I don’t want to stress to beat a level I want to relax and play the game. Will be deleting it.

I liked playing but I don’t like all the advertisements so I’M DELETING IT NOW.

Also something else that bothers me is that you can't even watch an ad for a second chance at the level, nor being able to at least watch an ad or 2 to get some in game coins instead of just buying them\getting them daily after 24 hours of waiting, or mostly seen as 23:59:59.

This game has ads. It’s advertised as having no ads. Once you pass level 20, it makes you download a separate game, and once you pass level 25 there’s mandatory ads. Wish I could give 0 stars for false advertising. Also every time you pass a level there’s an ad.

I will rack up a ton of coins and then the game pops up with a prompt to spend 900 coins on 30 seconds of time where it would usually be a try again button, so you mistakenly hit it and waste everything you have.

Also there are buttons on the bottom that make you waste your coins by purchasing things when you don’t want to. The layout is terrible.

the game was great until you clear the blocks and instead of more blocks appearing the time keeps ticking, just leaving you to wait until the game decides to put more blocks on the screen so you can complete the level, that’s if the time hasn’t ran out by the time more blocks appear.
once you get up to a certain level, the ads do come AND they place timers so its no longer a relaxing game. Disappointed and Uninstalling. It was good while it lasted.
Give better rewards for passing levels. This game is very stingy compared to others. It takes a lot of wins to get a coins or prizes.

The game itself has been fun, but having to watch players name themselves derogatory names have not been. If I were able to add a picture, I would definitely do so. To allow someone to name themselves the n word with hard er is very disheartening. I will have to delete the game and find another way to pass time.

neutral.text: Turn off the timer This is a thing game, not a race.
I would like an option to skip the super hard levels. I would try them but don’t want to wait days to earn the help needed to get through them.

Well I was quite looking forward to playing this game and was having fun in the beginning until…I had to take a break to do something else!! Oops my bad I should’ve read through the whole thing I didn’t know I was on a timer!?!? Or that I’d probably be forced to buy more time?!
For me personally games are something I do like everyone else, to exercise my brain. But also to relax and enjoy!!
For me feeling like I’m under the gun so to speak is not my idea of fun, enjoyment or relaxation!!
So I deleted “Block Out” pretty quickly to make room for another game that’s more to my liking! 
I’m a bit disappointed because the main premise of the game and the visuals I really did like! Just not being pressured by the Clock or to buy more coins to continue playing!!

So I bid farewell to “Block Out” to let people that enjoy timers and having to get more coins to buy more time to just continue to play it!! Just not my cup of tea!!
It’s a fun game but players are barely given sufficient time to solve levels.  Boosts are overpriced and as a result coins end up being wasted because you can’t finish the level on time.

I thought there wasn’t a timer. It is no fun for older lady to work with a timer. Plus some blocks are placed to require using a tool to move big blocks, that means you are specifically requiring a buy to move the block to win 
No fun anymore when forced to buy a tool to win a game 
No option to skip a level as well
I will need to remove your game bc I don’t want to buy a tool to remove a block. I am only at a very 
low level
Nivel 15 ensoroso

The game concept is great but almost every level’s timer is too short to be able to complete the puzzle in one go. You either have to buy 30 more seconds at 900 coins at a time or lose a life and start over.  I’m looking to have a brain challenge but not with this game. I’ll be deleting this one and going with a similar puzzle game without a timer.
Not a big fan of the timer

This game is fine and a great way too spend time when waiting for stuff, but to be honest there are some things I would change, for example there are way too many pop ups not adds pop up’s that make you go into a contest you probably don’t even wanna be in and the super hard levels only get like 1 minute which isn’t enough and it’s AI generated art just take sometime to make the art yourself instead of killing polar bears but anyway yea this game is fine.
It a good game, but it be more fun without a timer
Don’t like it
Why do I have adds yet my friends don’t? I thought this was an add free game?
I really enjoyed this app. However, I am elderly and am not very fast, so many of the puzzles require less time that I can finish.
Fun game but I got to level 99 and couldn’t pass it because it’s too hard and they don’t give you enough time to complete the levels. For power ups they expect you to pay. So I deleted the app.
I like it but it advertises no ads and there are. I hate that if it’s a difficult level you can blow through all the lives and have to wait for more or buy them. That’s annoying.
Nice mechanics, but the time limit is unnerving. There should be an option of a chill, contemplative gameplay. You get to either vex me with the ads, or the counter. Not both.

I love the graphics. I love the vibes. I wish there was a no timer option limit option because I like the challenge but not the anxiety surrounding a minute and 30 seconds of a super challenging puzzle. And with all of the things you guys integrate— the block cages and the blocks coming out from a door once one area is solved—it’s already super challenging. Please think about this in future updates because I cannot afford the buying of assists. Lol
The time limit makes it harder to just enjoy without having to buy coins or advantages.
I don’t like having a timer if you could shut it off for us older folks it would be a great game

I love this game but really the time stresses me out I hate that it has a time like really? I love the game but if it had no time
